Join the beta
KasaM · Close to Home
Home is who you trust.

KasaM connects Metro Manila households with verified helpers — cleaning, cooking, childcare, elder care, drivers, nurses. Every single one personally vetted, kilala namin sila. Because the people who care for your home deserve to be chosen with care.

Join the beta How it works ↓

Closed beta · Android · Invite-only

Verified means we actually checked.

Hindi lang profile photo at pangalan. Every helper on KasaM goes through ID verification, reference calls, and a sit-down interview with our team before they ever appear in your search.

Government ID verified
References personally called
Interviewed face-to-face

Verification protects helpers too — kapag verified ka, hindi ka na kailangang magpatunay paulit-ulit.

Every kind of hand
a home needs.

Whether it's the everyday or the extra-important, may tao kami for it.

Cleaning
Regular or deep-clean, bahala ka sa schedule
Cooking
Home cooks who know their adobo from their afritada
Childcare
Yayas with real references, not just resumes
Elder care
Patient, experienced alaga for lolo and lola
Driver
Family drivers who know EDSA and know your route
Nurse
Licensed private-duty care at home

Ganito lang kadali.

Three steps. That's it, promise.

01
Find someone verified
Browse helpers near you — every profile already checked, interviewed, and vouched for. Walang hulaan.
02
Kwentuhan muna
Chat inside the app. Ask about experience, days, expectations. Get a feel for each other — like meeting through a kapitbahay you trust.
03
Book the date
Pick a start date and confirm. During beta there are NO payments in the app — the deposit is a word-of-honor attestation between you. A handshake, hindi bayad.

All of it, in one warm little app.

Verified profiles, chat, and booking live in the KasaM app for Android. We're in closed beta around Metro Manila — invite lang muna, kasi we'd rather grow slow and get trust right than grow fast and get it wrong.

Android/ Metro Manila/ Closed beta
Already invited? Open your invite →

Halika. Come closer to home.

We're inviting a small number of Metro Manila households and helpers into the KasaM beta. If home is who you trust, tara — let's build it together.

Join the beta

Free during beta · No payments in-app · Invite-only

Helper ka? We'd love to meet you — verified helpers choose their households too. Mag-sign up para sa interview.
